js.Backbone: npx backbone-cli new my-project && npm install

py.Django: django-admin startproject my-project && pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py runserver
py.Flask: mkdir my-project && cd my-project && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install Flask && deactivate
py.Pyramid: pcreate -s starter my-project && pip install -r requirements.txt && pserve development.ini
py.FastAPI: mkdir my-project && cd my-project && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install fastapi uvicorn && deactivate

rb.Ruby on Rails: rails new my-project && bundle install && rails server

go.Gin: go mod init my-project && go get github.com/gin-gonic/gin && go build && ./my-project

java.Spring Boot: spring init --dependencies=web my-project && mvn package && java -jar target/my-project-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar
